CHALLENGE_BATTLE_SCARS_SPECIAL_RULES:
At the end of combat, if you have 50% or less HP, add a [gold]Wound[/gold] into your [gold]Deck.[/gold] 
 Whenever you Rest at a Rest Site, a random Wound in your Deck becomes an Infection.
CHALLENGE_CURSED_COMBO_SPECIAL_RULES: At the start of Act 2, obtain Runic Pyramid.
CHALLENGE_THE_ROOST_SPECIAL_RULES: Hatching at a Rest Site only hatches a single Byrdonis Egg rather than all of them.
CHALLENGE_THE_ROOST_WIN_CONDITIONS:
Defeat the Act 3 boss OR 
 Obtain 5 Byrdpips.
CHALLENGE_VERY_CURSED_COMBO_SPECIAL_RULE:
This challenge is hidden until the completion of the [gold]Cursed Combo[/gold] challenge. 
 At the start of Act 2, obtain Runic Pyramid.
CHALLENGE_SNECKROBINDER_SPECIAL_RULES: ALL 0 and 1 cost cards in card rewards are Enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple].
CHALLENGE_FAST_TRACK_SPECIAL_RULES:
Skip Act 1 entirely. 
 Start with 3 Cure All potions.
CHALLENGE_SHOOTING_STAR_SPECIAL_RULES:
At the start of each combat, play a Bombardment. 
 Bombardment can hit ANYONE.
CHALLENGE_HOT_POTATO_SPECIAL_RULES:
Start with 3 Gambler's Brew potions. 
 Whenever a Curse is Exhausted, lose 20 Max HP.
CHALLENGE_BURN_BRIGHT_SPECIAL_RULES:
[gold]Toy Box[/gold] does not provide Relics upon pickup and will not expire. 
 Whenever you obtain a Relic, it becomes wax.
CHALLENGE_SPLIT_PERSONALITY_SPECIAL_RULE:
Enemies drop 1 less card reward. 
 Obtain a Sea Glass from another character after each Ancient.
CHALLENGE_ULTIMATE_FORM_SPECIAL_RULES: Ancients heal 0% of your missing HP.
CHALLENGE_VAKUU_TAKE_THE_PRISMATIC_WHEEL:
This challenge is hidden until the completion of the [gold]Vakuu Take The Wheel[/gold] challenge. 
 Vakuu plays EVERY turn for you.
CHALLENGE_VAKUU_TAKE_THE_WHEEL_SPECIAL_R: Vakuu plays EVERY turn for you.
VAKUU_AUTO_END_DESCRIPTION: If enabled, Vakuu will automatically end your turn after he is unable to play any more cards.
